spend.text: 42.5% of your customized spending limit for the current cycle is consumed.

advisor.title: Advisor tool
advisor.description: Increase intelligence while minimizing cost and token usage. A cheaper model consults a stronger advisor mid-task.

fastMode.title: Fast mode
fastMode.description: Up to 2.5x faster output on supported models, at premium pricing. Same model, same intelligence.

batch.title: Batch API
batch.description: Move async workloads to the Batch API and save 50% on standard API prices.

caching.title: Prompt caching
caching.description: Reuse prompt prefixes across API calls. Most orgs see input costs drop 50–90%.

activity.description: Real-time request logs for this workspace

settings.title: Settings

general.instructionsDesc: Prohor will keep these in mind across chats and Cowork.
general.motionDesc: Reduce animation in streaming responses and other interface elements.
general.responseCompletionsDesc: Get notified when Prohor has finished a response. Useful for long-running tasks.
general.dispatchMessagesDesc: Get a push notification on your phone when Prohor messages you in Dispatch.

apiKeys.modalDescription: Give your new key a descriptive name to identify it later.
apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.desc: API keys are owned by workspaces and remain active even after the creator is removed
apiKeys.planDesc: This free plan is for evaluating Prohor's capabilities before commercial use.

upgrade.title: Plans that grow with you
upgrade.teamDesc: For custom enterprise integrations, volume discounts, or custom team deployments, please reach out to our team at sales@prohor.com.

features: Chat on web, iOS, Android, and desktop
